name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
✮ favorites ✮

ಠಿ⁠ヮ⁠ಠ

So what if your family has favorites? That's fine, it's not like you're being obviously outcasted or berated, you're not being abused so why are you so sad? Your sisters not nearly as messed up as you, why are you the complicated one?

(⁠╯⁠︵⁠╰⁠,⁠)

I see a few of these on the regular chats (none cod) and I kinda wanted to make my own, idk if this is gonna work and if it doesn't I'm not gonna fix it lmaoo so just write a comment saying it sucks and I'll delete it.
creator: AA_member
